becomeVendor.benefit1Desc: Upload your products with images, technical specifications, certifications. Your catalog always up to date and accessible.
becomeVendor.benefit2Desc: Earnings automatically tracked with every sale, with a monthly sales report always available in your dashboard.
becomeVendor.benefit3Desc: Your buyers are dental professionals — practices, clinics, labs. Not generic consumers.
becomeVendor.benefit4Desc: Receive an email for every new order. Update shipping status and tracking directly from your dashboard.

becomeVendor.benefit6Desc: View your catalog's performance: best-selling products, orders, and monthly revenue.
becomeVendor.step1Desc: 6 months of full access, no credit card required. Upload your products and explore the platform.
becomeVendor.step2Desc: Add products one by one or import everything via Excel. Images, prices, descriptions, MDR certifications.
becomeVendor.step3Desc: Professionals find your products, buy them, and you get a notification email right away. Ship and get paid.

contact.messageSent: Message sent! We'll reply within 1-2 business days.
contact.sendFailedRetry: Failed to send, please try again later or email us directly at support@oralzon.com
contact.heroSubtitle: We are a B2B marketplace for the dental sector. For questions about the platform, your account, or technical issues, write to us: we'll reply as soon as possible.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.subjectVendor: I want to become a seller
contact.orderQuestionTitle: Have a question about an order or product?
contact.orderQuestionDesc: Oralzon is a marketplace: products, shipping, and returns are managed directly by individual sellers, not by us. For specific questions about an order, it's best to contact the seller directly.
contact.goToMyOrdersStep: Go to "My Orders" and find the relevant product
contact.clickVendorNameStep: Click the seller's name to open their storefront
contact.useContactEmailStep: Use the contact email published on their store page
contact.helpTechnical: Technical issues with the site or account
contact.helpFeedback: Reports and feedback about the platform
contact.faqSubtitle: Answers to the most common questions about how the marketplace works
contact.faq1a: Oralzon is a marketplace: each supplier independently manages the shipping of their products. Delivery times vary by seller and are indicated on the product page. You'll receive a tracking email as soon as the seller ships your order.
contact.faq2a: Prices are set independently by each supplier based on their own commercial terms. Oralzon does not apply its own discounts or price lists: any offers for bulk purchases or repeat customers depend on the individual seller's policies.
contact.faq3a: Every supplier operating on Oralzon must ensure their products comply with the MDR (EU 2017/745) regulation on medical devices. Responsibility for the compliance of individual products remains with the seller marketing them.
contact.faq4q: How do I contact a seller about an order question?
contact.faq4a: Go to the seller's public store page (click their name from a product or one of your orders) and use the contact email listed there to write to them directly.
contact.faq5a: From the "My Orders" section you can request a return for a product already shipped. The seller will review the request and reply within 48-72 hours with the outcome. If approved, the refund is automatically processed to your original payment method once the seller confirms receipt of the returned product.
contact.faq6q: Does Oralzon charge commissions on sales?
contact.faq6a: Yes, we apply a commission on completed sales, which covers payment processing costs and platform service. Details are provided in the Terms of Sale. We also offer 6 months of free subscription for the first sellers who sign up.

faqPage.pageSubtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about Oralzon
faqPage.teamAvailable: Our team is available to help you
faqPage.c1q: How do I register on Oralzon?
faqPage.c1a: Click 'Log in' in the top right, then 'Create Customer Account'. Enter your name, email, and password. You can start shopping right after registering.
faqPage.c2q: How does checkout and payment work?
faqPage.c2a: Add products to your cart, go to checkout, enter your shipping address, and proceed to secure payment via Stripe. We accept all major credit and debit cards.
faqPage.c3a: Each supplier independently handles the shipping of their products. You will receive a notification with the tracking number as soon as the package is shipped.
faqPage.c4q: Can I buy products from multiple suppliers in a single order?
faqPage.c4a: Yes, you can add products from multiple suppliers to the same cart. Shipping will be handled separately by each supplier.
faqPage.c5q: How can I track my order?
faqPage.c5a: Go to 'My Orders' in your account. You'll see the status of each product and the tracking number once the supplier has shipped it.
faqPage.c6q: How do I make a return?
faqPage.c6a: From the 'My Orders' section you can request a return for a product already shipped, stating the reason. The seller reviews the request and replies within 48-72 hours with the outcome and return instructions.
faqPage.c7a: Absolutely. Oralzon never sees or stores your card details. All payments are handled by Stripe, one of the most secure payment systems in the world.
faqPage.v1q: How can I sell on Oralzon?
faqPage.v1a: Click 'Sell on Oralzon' and register as a seller. Choose the plan that best suits your needs, upload your products, and start selling.
faqPage.v2a: We offer a single plan at €129/month with unlimited products, plus a 6-month free trial with no credit card required. A commission also applies to each sale, covering payment processing costs (details in the Terms of Sale).
faqPage.v3q: Does Oralzon take commissions on sales?
faqPage.v3a: Yes, we apply a commission on every completed sale, covering payment processing costs and platform service. Details are provided in the Terms of Sale.
faqPage.v4a: Payments are processed by Stripe via automatic transfers directly to your connected account, once order delivery is confirmed.
faqPage.v5q: Can I upload products in bulk?
faqPage.v5a: Yes, the seller plan includes bulk upload via Excel file. You'll find the template in the 'Import Excel' section of the seller dashboard.
faqPage.v6a: You are responsible for shipping your products. When you receive an order, you can update the status in the 'Orders' section of the dashboard and enter the tracking number.
faqPage.p1q: What kind of products can I find on Oralzon?
faqPage.p1a: You'll find everything for the dental practice: disposables, sterilization, dental instruments, implantology, orthodontics, endodontics, impression materials, prosthetics, radiology, furnishings, disinfection, and much more.
faqPage.p2a: We require sellers' dental products to comply with the MDR (EU 2017/745) regulation on medical devices. The verification process is being progressively strengthened.
faqPage.p3q: How do I use advanced search?
faqPage.p3a: Use the search bar at the top of the site. You can filter by category, price, seller, and sort results by relevance, price, or newest.

chiSiamo.kicker: The B2B Marketplace for Italian Dentistry
chiSiamo.heroSubtitle: Oralzon was born with a precise goal: to eliminate inefficiencies between those who produce excellent dental instruments and materials and those who use them every day to transform smiles.
chiSiamo.missionTitle: Building the future of professional dentistry
chiSiamo.missionP1: Every day, thousands of dental practices and dental laboratories in Italy face the same challenge: finding the right suppliers, comparing certified products, managing orders efficiently. All while their priority — patients — are waiting.
chiSiamo.missionP2: Oralzon solves this problem at the root. We've created a platform where every product is verified, every supplier is accredited, and every transaction is protected. Because when it comes to oral health, there's no room for compromise.
chiSiamo.feat1Desc: Every seller undergoes verification of company documentation and product certifications.
chiSiamo.feat2Desc: From payment confirmation to shipping notification, everything is automated and traceable.
chiSiamo.feat3Desc: An exclusive community of dentists, hygienists, dental technicians, and purchasing managers.
chiSiamo.feat4Desc: Every order can be monitored from confirmation to delivery, with automatic notifications at every step.
chiSiamo.whyTitle: The dental market deserves a higher standard
chiSiamo.whyDesc: We analyzed the procurement processes of hundreds of Italian dental practices. The result? Hours lost on paper catalogs, fax orders, quotes that never arrive. Oralzon is the answer.
chiSiamo.stat1Text: Every product on Oralzon complies with the MDR EU 2017/745 regulation on medical devices. Safety is not optional.
chiSiamo.stat2Text: We are not a generic e-commerce site. Every feature is designed for the specific needs of dental professionals.
chiSiamo.stat3Text: The dental market evolves. Our platform is continuously updated to keep pace with regulations, technologies, and best practices.
chiSiamo.vendorsTitle: Reach thousands of professionals without intermediaries
chiSiamo.vendorsDesc: On Oralzon you upload your products, manage orders from your dashboard, and ship directly to the customer. Simple, efficient, profitable.
chiSiamo.buyersTitle: Everything your practice needs, in one place
chiSiamo.buyersDesc: Certified disposables, sterilization instruments, implantology kits, prosthetic materials. Order from multiple suppliers in a single checkout, track every shipment, manage returns easily.
